features.name: query_name_token_overlap
features.description: Token overlap between query and STE name.

features.name: query_category_token_overlap
features.description: Token overlap between query and category.

features.name: query_attribute_token_overlap
features.description: Token overlap between query and attributes.

features.name: query_token_coverage
features.description: Coverage of query tokens by candidate fields.

features.name: query_exact_name_match
features.description: Exact normalized query phrase appears in STE name.

features.name: query_length_tokens
features.description: Number of query tokens.

features.name: candidate_name_length_tokens
features.description: Length of candidate STE name in tokens.

features.name: candidate_attribute_count
features.description: Number of known candidate attributes.

features.name: query_attribute_match_count
features.description: Count of query tokens matched in attribute keys.

features.name: user_total_purchase_count
features.description: Total historical purchases of the customer.

features.name: user_category_purchase_count
features.description: Historical purchase count in candidate category.

features.name: user_ste_purchase_count
features.description: Historical purchase count of the candidate STE.

features.name: user_supplier_purchase_count
features.description: Historical purchase count from candidate dominant supplier.

features.name: user_category_purchase_share
features.description: Share of purchases in candidate category.

features.name: user_repeat_buy_signal
features.description: Candidate STE already exists in purchase history.

features.name: user_novelty_signal
features.description: Candidate STE is new for the customer.

features.name: user_last_category_recency_days
features.description: Days since last purchase in candidate category.

features.name: user_last_ste_recency_days
features.description: Days since last purchase of candidate STE.

features.name: user_last_supplier_recency_days
features.description: Days since last purchase from candidate dominant supplier.

features.name: user_recent_30d_purchase_count
features.description: Historical purchases in last 30 days.

features.name: user_recent_90d_purchase_count
features.description: Historical purchases in last 90 days.

features.name: user_recent_30d_category_count
features.description: Historical purchases in category in last 30 days.

features.name: user_recent_90d_category_count
features.description: Historical purchases in category in last 90 days.

features.name: user_avg_amount
features.description: Average contract amount of the user history.

features.name: user_median_amount
features.description: Median contract amount of the user history.

features.name: category_price_p25
features.description: 25th percentile of historical category price proxy.

features.name: category_price_p75
features.description: 75th percentile of historical category price proxy.

features.name: candidate_price_proxy
features.description: Candidate price proxy from historical contracts.

features.name: candidate_price_vs_user_avg_ratio
features.description: Candidate price proxy divided by user average amount.

features.name: candidate_price_distance_to_user_median
features.description: Absolute distance between candidate price proxy and user median amount.

features.name: candidate_price_in_user_range
features.description: Candidate price is inside category/user habitual range.

features.name: global_ste_popularity
features.description: Historical global popularity of candidate STE.

features.name: global_category_popularity
features.description: Historical global popularity of candidate category.

features.name: regional_ste_popularity
features.description: Historical popularity of candidate STE in the user region.

features.name: regional_category_popularity
features.description: Historical popularity of candidate category in the user region.

features.name: similar_customer_ste_popularity
features.description: Historical popularity among a lightweight similar-customer segment.

features.name: seasonal_category_popularity
features.description: Historical category popularity in the same calendar month.

features.name: days_since_last_similar_purchase
features.description: Days since last purchase in the same category.

features.name: candidate_ste_recent_30d_popularity
features.description: Recent 30d popularity of candidate STE.

features.name: candidate_category_recent_90d_popularity
features.description: Recent 90d popularity of candidate category.

features.name: candidate_primary_supplier_share
features.description: Share of the dominant supplier in historical candidate purchases.

features.name: candidate_supplier_affinity
features.description: Affinity of the user to the candidate dominant supplier.

features.name: candidate_supplier_region_match
features.description: Dominant supplier region matches the user region.

features.name: candidate_item_kind_affinity
features.description: Affinity of the user to the candidate item kind.
